assertionResults.reason: Root page loads at http://localhost:8000/ from static assets. Network confirms GET /static/js/app.js -> 200 (text/javascript, 12926 bytes) and GET /static/css/style.css -> 200 (text/css, 2928 bytes), both served through nginx/1.29.5. Page renders with all three forms (Single Token Price, Batch Token Pricing, Token Classification). Only console error is expected favicon.ico 404.
evidence: screenshot: val-static-001-page-loaded.png
network: GET http://localhost:8000/static/js/app.js => 200 OK (text/javascript; charset=utf-8, 12926 bytes, Server: nginx/1.29.5)
network: GET http://localhost:8000/static/css/style.css => 200 OK (text/css; charset=utf-8, 2928 bytes, Server: nginx/1.29.5)
network: GET http://localhost:8000/ => 200 OK
console: 1 error — favicon.ico 404 (expected/known quirk)

assertionResults.reason: Chain selector dropdown contains all four chains: Ethereum, Arbitrum, Optimism, Base. Each selection updates the dropdown value and retains the selected value. Verified by selecting each chain sequentially and confirming [selected] state in DOM snapshot.
evidence: screenshot: val-static-002-arbitrum.png (Arbitrum selected)
screenshot: val-static-002-optimism.png (Optimism selected)
screenshot: val-static-002-base.png (Base selected)
snapshot: combobox shows option 'Ethereum', 'Arbitrum', 'Optimism', 'Base' with correct [selected] attribute after each change

assertionResults.reason: Loading http://localhost:8000/?chain=arbitrum&token=<ARBITRUM_USDC_ADDRESS>&block=12345 pre-fills all three fields: chain selector shows 'Arbitrum' [selected], token address input contains the full address, block field contains '12345'.
evidence: screenshot: val-static-007-prefilled.png
snapshot: combobox shows 'Arbitrum' [selected], textbox 'Token Address' text='<ARBITRUM_USDC_ADDRESS>', textbox 'Block / Date (optional)' text='12345'

assertionResults.reason: GET /static/tokenlists/uniswap-default.json returns 200 with valid tokenlist JSON. Parsed response contains name='Uniswap Labs Default' and tokens array with 1367 entries.
evidence: network: GET http://localhost:8000/static/tokenlists/uniswap-default.json => 200 OK
terminal: python3 JSON parse confirms name='Uniswap Labs Default', token_count=1367, has_tokens=True

assertionResults.reason: grep for 'INDEX_HTML' in src/server.py returns no matches. The root handler at line 680 is 'async def index() -> FileResponse' which serves static/index.html via FileResponse. StaticFiles mounted at /static (line 131).
evidence: terminal: grep INDEX_HTML src/server.py -> no matches
terminal: server.py line 680-684 shows '@app.get("/") async def index() -> FileResponse' serving FileResponse(index_path, media_type="text/html")

assertionResults.reason: Docker compose is running with all containers healthy (nginx, ypm-ethereum, ypm-arbitrum, ypm-optimism, ypm-base). docker compose build --dry-run succeeds for all 4 chain services. Static UI is served correctly through nginx proxy at localhost:8000 (confirmed by Server: nginx/1.29.5 header on static asset responses). Full page screenshot confirms UI renders correctly through the dockerized nginx proxy.
evidence: terminal: docker compose ps shows all 5 containers Up and healthy
terminal: docker compose build --dry-run succeeds for ypm-ethereum, ypm-arbitrum, ypm-optimism, ypm-base
terminal: docker compose images shows all images built (1.45GB each, built 39 minutes ago)
network: curl -I /static/js/app.js returns Server: nginx/1.29.5 confirming nginx proxy
screenshot: val-static-001-page-loaded.png (UI through nginx)

summary: Tested 6 assertions: all 6 passed. Static files (app.js, style.css) served correctly through nginx with 200 status. Chain selector supports all 4 chains with value persistence. URL query parameters pre-fill form fields correctly. Tokenlist endpoint returns valid JSON with 1367 tokens. INDEX_HTML fully removed from server.py; root handler serves static/index.html via FileResponse. Docker build validated with running containers and dry-run; UI confirmed served through nginx proxy.
